creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to pascal.guitierrez from comment #0)
> This machine has 16GB of RAM with no swap (have also tried with swap on zvol but same effect)

Try swap at least 1GB on raw partition.

(In reply to pascal.guitierrez from comment #1)
> even when reducing vfs.zfs.arc_max=1073741824

In /boot/loader.conf? It's strange - on all my hosts with zfs limit work (but it's on 13.2).

P.S. I'm not zfs developer, but I'm zfs user.
